summary: Completed backend + frontend regression for newly added user auth/profile, services discovery, assignment notifications, and existing booking/admin/subscription flows.
action_items: No functional blockers found in requested scope.
Optional hardening: replace sync requests.post calls in async backend notification/payment codepaths with async HTTP client to avoid event-loop blocking under concurrent load.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py uses synchronous requests.post in async execution paths (_create_razorpay_order, _send_sms_message, _send_email_message).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST/UI users, bookings, worker subscription+worker record, and admin assignment updates during this run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated /api/users/register, /api/users/login, /api/users/profile GET/PUT, /api/users/bookings, user auth/profile pages, all-services search/filter, home quick search, booking+worker expanded service options, admin tabs/search/suggest/save flow, track-booking page, and assignment notification-log attempts to user SMS/email. Twilio remains intentionally not configured; SMS logs show attempt/failure detail as expected.
rca of the issue: No blocking defect reproduced in this iteration.
